rationale: Educ. Code §48.053 governs special-purpose district funding and references tier one local share under §48.256, but does not reference homestead exemption amounts or Tax Code §11.13(b). No direct conflict.
quote: A school district to which this section applies is entitled to funding under this chapter as if the district were a full-time hybrid campus or full-time virtual campus for purposes of Section 30B.106 with no tier one local share for purposes of Section 48.256 for each student enrolled in the district
_note: No direct reference to homestead exemption or Tax Code §11.13(b) in this section. Indirect fiscal interactions would flow through §48.256 local share calculations, not this section.
